title: Neglected Tropical Disease Mass Drug Administration Coverage Gaps In Sub-Saharan Africa
summary: Build a verified workflow for identifying where NTD mass drug administration coverage is lowest and disease persistence is highest, linking WHO PCT data, treatment registers, and disease-mapping data at district scale.
why_it_matters: Over 1.7 billion people require mass drug administration for at least one neglected tropical disease annually. Lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis, schistosomiasis, soil-transmitted helminths, and trachoma are preventable with MDA. WHO tracks coverage but district-level program data is inconsistent and disease-mapping surveys to verify elimination are conducted infrequently.

success_metrics.target: Every coverage estimate links treatment and survey data with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
